prompt: A cinematic Japanese psychological horror game screenshot at night, shown from a third-person over-the-shoulder perspective behind a young man wearing a dark hooded jacket, standing under a convenience store awning and staring into a large front window. In the glass, instead of a normal reflection, there is a terrifying humanoid figure with an unnaturally elongated oval head, long straight black hair hanging down both sides, a pale expressionless face, and a dark coat, standing directly opposite him. Beyond the reflection is a wet urban street in Japan with glossy rain-soaked asphalt, sparse pedestrians holding umbrellas, dim storefronts, vending machines, parking signs, and tall buildings bending inward in a surreal warped perspective toward a dark swirling vortex in the sky at the end of the street. The convenience store window ledge displays exactly 5 visible magazine covers lined up side by side and exactly 8 instant food items or cup noodles stacked on the lower right. Add subtle in-game UI text in Japanese: exactly 2 objective lines in the upper left, and exactly 2 small action prompts in the lower left. Include readable Japanese street posters and shop signs, such as a large red staff recruitment sign on the upper right and a yellow points campaign sign on the lower right. Lighting is extremely dark, moody, and realistic, with reflections, deep shadows, damp textures, and a faint cold glow from interior lights and street lamps. Style: ultra-realistic survival horror video game, unsettling, grounded, detailed, cinematic, high contrast, eerie silence, no exaggerated action, no bright colors.
